scope.selection_note: Codex-only deterministic prep from current data/canonical/projects.jsonl, current data/identity-overrides/merges.json, current data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json, and a local project-only duplicate_global_identity reproduction. Excluded broad parent/child program collisions, phase/stage-only matches, current merge aliases, targets that are themselves current merge aliases, alias==target pairs, do-not-merge hits, missing current canonical ids, and specifically avoided the known Grand Central circulation and Hartsdale station direction traps.

proposed_aliases.reason: Both current records describe the New Jamaica Bus Depot design-build replacement/zero-emissions bus depot project. The alias record carries project_jamaica-bus-depot as a current record alias and cites the same Jamaica Bus Depot design-build scope and Skanska award context as the richer target cluster.

validator_evidence.duplicate_issue: Global project records project_jamaica-bus-depot and project_jamaica-bus-depot-db-jan2023 share identity key project_jamaica-bus-depot.

proposed_aliases.reason: Both records identify third-rail state-of-good-repair work on the Montauk Branch. The target has the more specific Amityville-to-Babylon limits and two-source evidence; the alias is a single-source spelling variant of the same SGR/SOGR project.

alias.project_name: Third Rail State of Good Repair Work on the Montauk Branch

target.display_name: Third Rail State of Good Repair - Montauk Branch
target.project_name: Third Rail State of Good Repair work on the Montauk Branch between Amityville and Babylon
target.location: Montauk Branch between Amityville and Babylon

validator_evidence.duplicate_issue: Global project records project_meeting-doc-109341-third-rail-sgr-montauk and project_meeting-doc-115156-third-rail-sogr-montauk share identity key project_third-rail-state-of-good-repair-work-on-the-montauk-branch.

proposed_aliases.reason: Both records have the same long project name for Metro-North Customer Service Initiative outlying-station PA/VIS/surveillance/access-control work at 20 stations and facilities. Differences are classification/status wording only.

alias.display_name: MNR Customer Service Initiative - Outlying Stations
alias.project_name: Customer Service Initiative (CSI) - Outlying Stations Public Announcement/Visual Information and Surveillance/Access Control Systems

target.project_name: Customer Service Initiative (CSI) - Outlying Stations Public Announcement/Visual Information and Surveillance/Access Control Systems

validator_evidence.duplicate_issue: Global project records project_mnr-csi-outlying-stations and project_mnr-csi-stations share identity key project_customer-service-initiative-csi-outlying-stations-public-announcement-visual-information-and-sur.

proposed_aliases.reason: Both records identify MTA Small Business Development Program (SBDP). The alias is a one-source duplicate of the same program; the target is the durable multi-source program cluster.

validator_evidence.duplicate_issue: Global project records project_small-business-development-program and project_small-business-development-program-166966 share identity key project_mta-small-business-development-program-sbdp.

proposed_aliases.reason: Both records describe the same Tarrytown transit-oriented development at 2 Depot Plaza: an 88-unit multifamily housing project with ground-floor artist/workshop/gallery uses. The target has the fuller two-source board-document cluster and station-access context.

validator_evidence.duplicate_issue: Global project records project_tarrytown-tod-housing and project_tarrytown-tod-meeting-doc-151756 share identity key project_tarrytown-transit-oriented-development-project.

proposed_aliases.reason: Both records identify the M86 Select Bus Service conversion/implementation project on the 86th Street corridor. The alias is the pre-launch CB7 presentation view; the target is the multi-source implementation/progress-report cluster.

validator_evidence.duplicate_issue: Global project records project_m86-sbs and project_m86-sbs-conversion-cb7-presentation share identity key project_m86-sbs.

proposed_aliases.reason: Both records carry the same long project identity for Metro-North station improvement initiatives at Harlem-125th Street, Riverdale, Crestwood, White Plains, and Port Chester. The alias has more detailed scope text, but it is the same named initiative as the target.

alias.display_name: Station Improvement Initiatives at Harlem-125th Street, Riverdale, Crestwood, White Plains and Port Chester
alias.project_name: Station Improvement Initiatives at Harlem-125th Street, Riverdale, Crestwood, White Plains and Port Chester

target.project_name: Station Improvement Initiatives at Harlem-125th Street, Riverdale, Crestwood, White Plains and Port Chester

validator_evidence.duplicate_issue: Global project records project_mnr-station-improvement-initiatives and project_mnr-station-improvements-5-stations share identity key project_station-improvement-initiatives-at-harlem-125th-st-riverdale-crestwood-white-plains-and-port-che.

proposed_aliases.reason: Both records are Metro-North Track Program quarterly update records. The alias has three earlier meeting-document sources; the target has the larger seven-source Track Program cluster and the same project/update identity.

validator_evidence.duplicate_issue: Global project records project_meeting-doc-track-program and project_track-program-quarterly-update share identity key project_track-program-quarterly-update.

excluded_same_name_but_different_phase_o: project_2020-2024-capital-program amendment records with different amendment numbers
excluded_broad_parent_child_program_coll: ABLE program vs ABLE expansion-only records
Central Business District Tolling Program vs TransCore contract modification or toll-revenue-obligation resolution
generic capital program records vs amendment-specific records

command_evidence.command: jq 'length' data/identity-overrides/merges.json && jq 'length' data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json && wc -l data/canonical/projects.jsonl
command_evidence.result_summary: Current override files parsed as JSON; projects.jsonl has 1921 records.

command_evidence.command: bun -e 'import { identityKeysForRecord, identityDoNotMergeSuppressed } from "./packages/db/src/identity.ts"; ... project-only duplicate scan ...'
command_evidence.result_summary: Reproduced 91 current project duplicate_global_identity issues without running full CLI validate.
Current project merge alias count is 285.
Only current project do-not-merge guard is project_better-buses-restart-2021 vs project_jamaica-busway.

command_evidence.command: jq current-record inspections over data/canonical/projects.jsonl for all proposed alias_id and target_id values
command_evidence.result_summary: Confirmed all proposed alias and target ids are present in current canonical JSONL and captured display_name, payload, source_ids, and evidence_refs from current records.
